Bash(cd "C:/Users/asus/academybase" && supabase migration list 2>&1 | grep -v "new version" | grep -v "currently installed" | grep -v "recommend")

Bash(cd "C:/Users/asus/academybase" && supabase db execute --file /dev/stdin 2>&1 <<'SQL'
SELECT con.conname, pg_get_constraintdef\(con.oid\) AS definition
FROM pg_constraint con
JOIN pg_class rel ON rel.oid = con.conrelid
WHERE rel.relname = 'staff_attendance'
  AND con.contype = 'c';
SQL)
Bash(cd "C:/Users/asus/academybase" && supabase db dump --schema public --linked 2>&1 | grep -A 10 "staff_attendance_status" | head -20)
Bash(cd "C:/Users/asus/academybase" && supabase db dump --schema public --linked 2>&1 | grep -i "no_training\\|staff_attendance_status\\|status_check" | head -10)
